title: Elise Bishop launches her book, "Graaffernet Sidestoep Stories"
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - On Saturday 24 May, the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - On Saturday 24 May, the Stoep Tasting weekend in Graaff-Reinet, Reinet House was the scene of lots of smiling faces and happy chatter.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - On Saturday 24 May, the Stoep Tasting weekend in Graaff-Reinet, Reinet House was the scene of lots of smiling faces and happy chatter."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This was thanks to the launching of Graaffernet Sidestoep Stories in Graafrikaans, written by the talented Elise Bishop."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was a heart-warming occasion marked by nostalgia, laughter and happy faces.","html":"It was a heart-warming occasion marked by nostalgia, laughter and happy faces."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The turnout exceeded all expectations and extra chairs had to be brought in.","html":"The turnout exceeded all expectations and extra chairs had to be brought in."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event began with a signing.","html":"The event began with a signing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A queue quickly formed as guests eagerly queued to meet Elise, who chatted and signed books with her signature warmth and humour.","html":"A queue quickly formed as guests eagerly queued to meet Elise, who chatted and signed books with her signature warmth and humour."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eventually it was time for the real treat of the occasion - Elise's storytelling. Her vivid, witty tales of yesteryear held the audience spellbound.","html":"Eventually it was time for the real treat of the occasion - Elise's storytelling. Her vivid, witty tales of yesteryear held the audience spellbound."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Time flew as she entertained everyone with her staaltjies and storietjies (anecdotes and short stories), sparking fond memories and plenty of laughter with her detailed narratives.","html":"Time flew as she entertained everyone with her staaltjies and storietjies (anecdotes and short stories), sparking fond memories and plenty of laughter with her detailed narratives."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Elise was the absolute the star of the morning, and in record time, every copy of her book was sold out.","html":"Elise was the absolute the star of the morning, and in record time, every copy of her book was sold out."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For those who have asked about getting a copy, Reinet House will inform Graaff-Reinet Advertiser as soon as Graaffernet Sidestoep Stories becomes available again.","html":"For those who have asked about getting a copy, Reinet House will inform Graaff-Reinet Advertiser as soon as Graaffernet Sidestoep Stories becomes available again."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reinet House also promises to order a limited number of Elise's autobiography, Twee Lewens.","html":"Reinet House also promises to order a limited number of Elise's autobiography, Twee Lewens."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Everyone in Graaff-Reinet can be proud of our Elise, our very own writer who tells stories from our town and our precious community in her heart-warming style.","html":"Everyone in Graaff-Reinet can be proud of our Elise, our very own writer who tells stories from our town and our precious community in her heart-warming style."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Elise Bishop launches her book, "Graaffernet Sidestoep Stories"
